title: Serious complaints about the dub
wikitext:
[]: Serious complaints about the dub? Post by Kozar927 » Mon Aug 03, 2009 12:59 pm I have been a fan of the dub since I started watching eva. I remember thinking how well this was dubbed compared to other animes. Their is so much geniun emotion in the english acters voices, but every one here despises the eng dub. Can you guys inform me as too why? I just think its so much better then mosts dubs out their and I prefer to watch anime in my native language.

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Aug 03, 2009 1:08 pm Not everyone here hates the dub. I like the English dub over the Japanese dub and a few other people here do to. Most here are loyal to the original dub (and Japanese dubs in general) and think the English dub (and almost any other dub) is a curse from Satan. It's better not to ask and just go along with it. Reasons why a lot of people do like the original Japanese dub over English is because they think the voices don't match the characters and it makes there ears bleed and also because of some translation errors. Don't pay any mind to those who want to bash the dub. As long as you enjoyed it, that is all that matters. Inb4 pointless dub vs. sub argument.

[]: Post by schismatics » Mon Aug 03, 2009 1:13 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Inb4 pointless dub vs. sub argument.

[]: Post by ZapX » Mon Aug 03, 2009 1:28 pm tommyleejones.jpg

[]: Re: Serious complaints about the dub? Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Aug 03, 2009 1:29 pm Kozar927 wrote: Serious complaints about the dub?
